title: SKIPIKET
description: SKIPIKET is a web application for managing classroom duty schedules at Immanuel School. It allows students, teachers, and staff to easily check who is on duty today, this week, or this month.

title: MieRendangPerfect
description: MieRendangPerfect is a discord bot that shows upcoming CTF events from CTFtime.org. It allows users to easily stay updated on upcoming CTF events and participate in them.
